summary:
Cessation of smoking is most effective for increasing birth weight due to its positive effect on maternal health and fetal growth. No other listed interventions show such strong support from current medical research regarding their ability to increase birth weight significantly. Summary: 
Cessation of smoking has been shown to improve maternal health and enhance fetal growth, thereby likely increasing birth weight more effectively than other mentioned interventions. Current studies provide stronger evidence supporting this approach over alternatives like aspirin use, vitamin supplementation, or bedrest.
